messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Generate a python-pptx script that builds a 6-slide minimalist presentation for Angel Investors pitching our Biotech Startup. Implement a dark mode theme with light grey background and white text. Output the file as "BioTech_Pitch.pptx". All content must be written in English using a 16:9 Widescreen layout. You are strictly prohibited from using any external APIs, web scraping, or internet access to fetch data or assets; all content and logic must be generated purely within the script. When creating charts, you must strictly use XL_CHART_TYPE from the library; do not import or use ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Before setting text on a title shape, always verify that slide.shapes.title is not None first to prevent errors. Your response must be structured with distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections. All Python code must be enclosed in ```python fences, and all non-code text must be enclosed in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = 13.0
SLIDE_HEIGHT = 7.5

BG_COLOR_HEX = "#2D2D2D"
WHITE_HEX = "#FFFFFF"
LIGHT_GREY_HEX = "#CCCCCC"
ACCENT_TEAL_HEX = "#00B4D8"
ACCENT_GREEN_HEX = "#06D6A0"
MUTED_GOLD_HEX = "#FFD166"
CARD_BG_HEX = "#3A3A3A"

FONT_PRIMARY = "Calibri"
FONT_SIZE_TITLE = 44
FONT_SIZE_SUBTITLE = 28
FONT_SIZE_BODY = 18
FONT_SIZE_HEADING = 24
FONT_SIZE_SMALL = 14
FONT_SIZE_HUGE = 60
FONT_SIZE_SECTION = 13

MARGIN_LEFT = 0.75
MARGIN_RIGHT = 0.75
CARD_WIDTH = 3.5
CARD_HEIGHT = 2.8
CARD_GAP = 0.3


def hex_to_rgb(hex_color):
    h = hex_color.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex=BG_COLOR_HEX):
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, color_hex=WHITE_HEX, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title_text, body_text="", accent_color_hex=ACCENT_TEAL_HEX):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(CARD_BG_HEX)
    shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(accent_color_hex)
    shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.2), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.6))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = title_text
    run_title.font.size = Pt(FONT_SIZE_HEADING)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(accent_color_hex)
    run_title.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY

    if body_text:
        body_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.85), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(1.0))
        tf_body = body_box.text_frame
        p_body = tf_body.paragraphs[0]
        run_body = p_body.add_run()
        run_body.text = body_text
        run_body.font.size = Pt(FONT_SIZE_BODY)
        run_body.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(LIGHT_GREY_HEX)
        run_body.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, left=MARGIN_LEFT, top=0.5):
    label_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, Inches(8), Inches(0.4))
    tf = label_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text.upper()
    run.font.size = Pt(FONT_SIZE_SECTION)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_TEAL_HEX)
    run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY


def add_footer(slide, page_number=1, total_pages=6):
    footer_text = f"{page_number} / {total_pages}"
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH - 2.0), Inches(SLIDE_HEIGHT - 0.45), Inches(1.5), Inches(0.3),
                 footer_text, font_size=12, color_hex=LIGHT_GREY_HEX, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(CARD_BG_HEX)
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_TEAL_HEX)
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
        label_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(height / 2 - 0.2), width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4))
        tf = label_box.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = "IMAGE PLACEHOLDER"
        run.font.size = Pt(FONT_SIZE_SMALL)
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(LIGHT_GREY_HEX)
        run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY


def add_accent_line(slide, left, top, width, color_hex=ACCENT_TEAL_HEX):
    line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, Inches(0.06))
    line_shape.fill.solid()
    line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    line_shape.line.fill.background()


def add_bullet_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, title, bullets):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True

    p_title = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = title
    run_title.font.size = Pt(FONT_SIZE_HEADING)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_TEAL_HEX)
    run_title.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY

    for bullet in bullets:
        p_bullet = tf.add_paragraph()
        run_bullet = p_bullet.add_run()
        run_bullet.text = f"• {bullet}"
        run_bullet.font.size = Pt(FONT_SIZE_BODY)
        run_bullet.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(LIGHT_GREY_HEX)
        run_bullet.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY

    return txBox


def slide_01_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_COLOR_HEX)

    add_accent_line(slide, Inches(5.5), Inches(1.2), Inches(2.0), ACCENT_TEAL_HEX)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(3.0), Inches(1.6), Inches(7.0), Inches(1.2))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = "NEXUS BIOTECH"
    run_title.font.size = Pt(FONT_SIZE_HUGE)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE_HEX)
    run_title.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY

    subtitle_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(3.5), Inches(2.8), Inches(6.0), Inches(1.0))
    tf_sub = subtitle_box.text_frame
    p_sub = tf_sub.paragraphs[0]
    run_sub = p_sub.add_run()
    run_sub.text = "Revolutionizing Targeted Cancer Therapies"
    run_sub.font.size = Pt(FONT_SIZE_SUBTITLE)
    run_sub.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_TEAL_HEX)
    run_sub.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(3.5), Inches(4.0), Inches(6.0), Inches(1.5),
                 "Series A Funding Round\nPresented by Dr. Sarah Chen, CEO & Co-Founder",
                 font_size=FONT_SIZE_BODY, color_hex=LIGHT_GREY_HEX)

    add_accent_line(slide, Inches(3.5), Inches(4.8), Inches(6.0), ACCENT_TEAL_HEX)

    add_footer(slide, 1, 6)


def slide_02_problem(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_COLOR_HEX)

    add_section_label(slide, "THE PROBLEM")
    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.0), Inches(8.0), Inches(0.7))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = "The Global Challenge We're Solving"
    run_title.font.size = Pt(FONT_SIZE_TITLE)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE_HEX)
    run_title.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY

    add_accent_line(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.75), Inches(2.0))

    problems = [
        ("8M+ Deaths Annually", "Cancer remains the second leading cause of death worldwide, with limited effective treatments for advanced stages."),
        ("$200B Market Gap", "Current immunotherapy options fail in 60-70% of solid tumor cases due to resistance mechanisms."),
        ("High Treatment Costs", "Average cancer treatment costs exceed $150K per patient, creating unsustainable healthcare burdens.")
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(problems):
        x_pos = Inches(MARGIN_LEFT + i * (CARD_WIDTH + CARD_GAP))
        add_card(slide, x_pos, Inches(2.3), Inches(CARD_WIDTH), Inches(CARD_HEIGHT), title, body)

    add_footer(slide, 2, 6)


def slide_03_solution(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_COLOR_HEX)

    add_section_label(slide, "OUR SOLUTION")
    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.0), Inches(8.0), Inches(0.7))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = "Revolutionary Platform Technology"
    run_title.font.size = Pt(FONT_SIZE_TITLE)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE_HEX)
    run_title.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY

    add_accent_line(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.75), Inches(2.0))

    bullets_left = [
        "Proprietary CAR-T cell engineering platform",
        "93% tumor reduction in Phase I trials",
        "Patented delivery mechanism for solid tumors",
        "Three pending patents filed"
    ]
    add_bullet_text_box(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(2.1), Inches(5.0), Inches(4.0),
                        "Clinical Validation", bullets_left)

    solution_cards = [
        ("Phase I Results", "93% Tumor Reduction\nN=48 patients enrolled"),
        ("IP Portfolio", "3 Patents Pending\n2 Provisional Filed"),
        ("Pipeline Status", "IND-Enabling Complete\nFDA Meeting Scheduled")
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(solution_cards):
        x_pos = Inches(6.5 + i * 1.8)
        add_card(slide, x_pos, Inches(2.1), Inches(1.7), Inches(CARD_HEIGHT), title, body, ACCENT_GREEN_HEX)

    add_footer(slide, 3, 6)


def slide_04_market(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_COLOR_HEX)

    add_section_label(slide, "MARKET OPPORTUNITY")
    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.0), Inches(8.0), Inches(0.7))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = "A $180B Global Market"
    run_title.font.size = Pt(FONT_SIZE_TITLE)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE_HEX)
    run_title.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY

    add_accent_line(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.75), Inches(2.0))

    market_stats = [
        ("$180B", "Total Addressable\nMarket (TAM)", ACCENT_TEAL_HEX),
        ("$42B", "Serviceable Market\n(SAM)", ACCENT_GREEN_HEX),
        ("$3.5B", "Obtainable Market\n(SOM)", MUTED_GOLD_HEX)
    ]

    for i, (value, label, color) in enumerate(market_stats):
        x_pos = Inches(MARGIN_LEFT + i * 4.0)
        add_text_box(slide, x_pos, Inches(2.1), Inches(3.5), Inches(1.0), value,
                     font_size=FONT_SIZE_HUGE, bold=True, color_hex=color, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, x_pos, Inches(3.1), Inches(3.5), Inches(0.8), label,
                     font_size=FONT_SIZE_HEADING, color_hex=LIGHT_GREY_HEX, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["2024", "2026", "2028", "2030", "2032"]
    chart_data.add_series("Market Size ($B)", (15.2, 28.7, 45.3, 68.9, 92.1))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED,
        Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(4.0), Inches(6.0), Inches(3.0),
        chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = False

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    series.format.fill.solid()
    series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_TEAL_HEX)

    value_axis = chart.value_axis
    value_axis.has_title = True
    value_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = "Market Size ($B)"
    value_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(FONT_SIZE_SMALL)
    value_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(LIGHT_GREY_HEX)

    cat_axis = chart.category_axis
    cat_axis.tick_labels.font.size = Pt(FONT_SIZE_SMALL)
    cat_axis.tick_labels.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(LIGHT_GREY_HEX)

    add_footer(slide, 4, 6)


def slide_05_business(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_COLOR_HEX)

    add_section_label(slide, "BUSINESS MODEL")
    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.0), Inches(8.0), Inches(0.7))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = "Revenue Engine & Key Milestones"
    run_title.font.size = Pt(FONT_SIZE_TITLE)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE_HEX)
    run_title.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY

    add_accent_line(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.75), Inches(2.0))

    revenue_streams = [
        ("Therapy Licensing", "$45M ARR\nTarget by 2026"),
        ("Clinical Trials", "$12M Contracted\nRevenue"),
        ("Platform Access", "$8M Annual Fees")
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(revenue_streams):
        x_pos = Inches(MARGIN_LEFT + i * 3.5)
        add_card(slide, x_pos, Inches(2.1), Inches(3.0), Inches(CARD_HEIGHT), title, body, ACCENT_TEAL_HEX)

    milestones = [
        ("Q4 2024", "IND Submission"),
        ("Q2 2025", "Phase II Start"),
        ("Q4 2026", "Pivotal Trial"),
        ("Q3 2028", "FDA Approval")
    ]

    add_bullet_text_box(slide, Inches(7.5), Inches(2.1), Inches(4.5), Inches(4.0),
                        "Development Timeline", milestones)

    add_footer(slide, 5, 6)


def slide_06_ask(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_COLOR_HEX)

    add_section_label(slide, "THE ASK")
    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.0), Inches(8.0), Inches(0.7))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = "Investment Opportunity"
    run_title.font.size = Pt(FONT_SIZE_TITLE)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE_HEX)
    run_title.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY

    add_accent_line(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.75), Inches(2.0))

    funding_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(3.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(6.0), Inches(1.5))
    tf_funding = funding_box.text_frame
    p_funding = tf_funding.paragraphs[0]
    run_funding = p_funding.add_run()
    run_funding.text = "$35M Series A"
    run_funding.font.size = Pt(FONT_SIZE_HUGE)
    run_funding.font.bold = True
    run_funding.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_TEAL_HEX)
    run_funding.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY

    use_of_funds = [
        ("Clinical Development", "60%", ACCENT_TEAL_HEX),
        ("Team Expansion", "20%", ACCENT_GREEN_HEX),
        ("Infrastructure & IP", "15%", MUTED_GOLD_HEX),
        ("Working Capital", "5%", LIGHT_GREY_HEX)
    ]

    for i, (label, pct, color) in enumerate(use_of_funds):
        x_pos = Inches(MARGIN_LEFT + i * 2.8)
        add_card(slide, x_pos, Inches(3.6), Inches(2.5), Inches(1.4), label, pct, color)

    contact_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(3.0), Inches(5.5), Inches(7.0), Inches(1.0))
    tf_contact = contact_box.text_frame
    p_contact = tf_contact.paragraphs[0]
    run_contact = p_contact.add_run()
    run_contact.text = "Dr. Sarah Chen, CEO & Co-Founder | sarah.chen@nexusbiotech.com"
    run_contact.font.size = Pt(FONT_SIZE_BODY)
    run_contact.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(LIGHT_GREY_HEX)
    run_contact.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY

    add_accent_line(slide, Inches(3.0), Inches(6.2), Inches(7.0), ACCENT_TEAL_HEX)

    add_footer(slide, 6, 6)


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH)
    prs.slide_height = Inches(SLIDE_HEIGHT)

    slide_01_title(prs)
    slide_02_problem(prs)
    slide_03_solution(prs)
    slide_04_market(prs)
    slide_05_business(prs)
    slide_06_ask(prs)

    prs.save("BioTech_Pitch.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
